title: Tacit mortgage abolished.
doc_html:
Art. 1395.  Tacit mortgage abolished.

The tacit mortgage which resulted from the partition for the execution of all the obligations contained therein, * no longer exists; but the heirs may stipulate a special mortgage.**

* English translation of French text incomplete; should include "or flowing therefrom."

** Note error in English translation of French text; "a special mortgage" should be "an express mortgage, if they see fit."
doc_text:
Art. 1395.  Tacit mortgage abolished.
The tacit mortgage which resulted from the partition for the execution of all the obligations contained therein, * no longer exists; but the heirs may stipulate a special mortgage.**
* English translation of French text incomplete; should include "or flowing therefrom."
** Note error in English translation of French text; "a special mortgage" should be "an express mortgage, if they see fit."
